chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.S- 808 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of MA No.996/2025. 13.11.2025. Mr. Munawar Ali Shah Lakiyari, Advocate for petitioner. = For reason to be recorded, the contempt application MA No.996/2025 filed by the petitioner is dismissed. JUDGE Tufail
